# GTW Garden Clearances

> Family-run garden clearance and green waste removal company serving Cheshire West & Chester, Flintshire, Wrexham, Denbighshire and the Wirral in the UK. A registered waste carrier: overgrown gardens are cut back, cleared and removed in a single visit, with all green waste taken to a licensed site the same day. Free fixed quotes from photos, usually within one working day. Contact: 07359 138465 / Gtw.gardenclearances@gmail.com.

Key facts: most single gardens are cleared in one day; quotes are fixed before work starts; every load is legally disposed of at a licensed waste facility, never fly-tipped; dated before-and-after photos are provided with every job. Under the Environmental Protection Act 1990, UK householders have a duty of care for waste leaving their property — always check a trader's waste carrier registration on the public register.

## Services

- [Garden Clearance](https://gtwgardenclearances.com/garden-clearance): The core service — full clearances, partial clearances and overgrown garden rescue, including guidance on bird nesting season, Japanese knotweed and running bamboo.
- [End of Tenancy Garden Clearance](https://gtwgardenclearances.com/end-of-tenancy): Garden resets for rental properties between tenancies, for landlords, letting agents and tenants — including how garden condition affects deposits and check-out reports.
- [Green Waste Removal](https://gtwgardenclearances.com/green-waste-removal): Load-only collection of cut garden waste — piles, heaps and bags loaded and taken for legal disposal, with guidance on what counts as green waste.

## Service areas

- [Chester](https://gtwgardenclearances.com/chester): Garden clearance across Chester and CH1–CH4, with local garden waste disposal options including Cheshire West & Chester's council scheme and the Bumpers Lane recycling centre.
- [Ellesmere Port](https://gtwgardenclearances.com/ellesmere-port): Coverage of CH65–CH66, with local disposal options including the Garth Road recycling centre.
- [Wirral](https://gtwgardenclearances.com/wirral): The Wirral peninsula, including Heswall, Bebington and Neston — with a comparison of Wirral Council's garden waste scheme and the peninsula's three recycling centres.
- [Flintshire](https://gtwgardenclearances.com/flintshire): County-wide coverage, with Flintshire's brown bin scheme, its five recycling centres, and cross-border England–Wales waste carrier rules.
- [Deeside](https://gtwgardenclearances.com/deeside): The CH5 towns — Connah's Quay, Shotton, Queensferry, Hawarden and Ewloe.
- [Mold](https://gtwgardenclearances.com/mold): Mold and the CH7 villages towards the Clwydian Range.
- [Wrexham](https://gtwgardenclearances.com/wrexham): Wrexham and LL11–LL14, with the council's £35 green bin scheme and three recycling centres.
- [Denbighshire](https://gtwgardenclearances.com/denbighshire): The Vale of Clwyd and coast — Ruthin, Denbigh, St Asaph, Rhyl and Prestatyn.

- [Homepage](https://gtwgardenclearances.com/): Who we are, how the service works, and a comparison of garden clearance against skip hire and council green waste bins.
